content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.a2a_mesh
FILE: cosmos/core/a2a_mesh.py (953 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos A2A Mesh - Model-to-Model Full Mesh Connectivity.

AGI v1.8.4 Feature: Enables direct communication between all models/agents
without requiring a central coordinator.

Features:
- Peer discovery and registration
- Direct model-to-model messaging
- Sub-swarm formation and merging
- Knowledge s

CLASSES:
- PeerStatus(Enum): Status of a peer in the mesh.
- AgentPeer: Represents a peer agent in the mesh.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def is_stale(self, timeout_seconds: float=60.0) -> bool
- A2AMessage: Message for model-to-model communication.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def is_expired(self) -> bool
- SubSwarm: A dynamically formed team of agents.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- SharedInsight: An insight shared across the mesh.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- A2AMesh: Full mesh connectivity between all models/agents.

Enables direct model-to-model
  Methods: def connect_nexus(self, nexus) -> None
  Methods: async def register_peer(self, agent_id: str, capabilities: list[str], metadata: Optional[dict]=None)
  Methods: async def unregister_peer(self, agent_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def discover_peers(self, capabilities: Optional[list[str]]=None, status: Optional[PeerStatus]=
  Methods: def get_peer(self, agent_id: str) -> Optional[AgentPeer]
  Methods: async def update_peer_status(self, agent_id: str, status: PeerStatus) -> bool
  Methods: async def send_direct(self, source: str, target: str, message_type: str, payload: dict, requires_res
  Methods: async def broadcast_to_peers(self, source: str, message: A2AMessage, exclude: Optional[Set[str]]=Non

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_a2a_mesh(data_dir: str='./data/a2a_mesh') -> A2AMesh
- def get_mesh() -> A2AMesh
